title: Red Light, Green Light
description: The tablet becomes a traffic light for a whole-body stop-and-go listening game.
learningGoals: Practice impulse control through stop/go movement
Switch actions in response to spoken cues
Build playful self-regulation with family participation
interactionModel: the tablet presents timed traffic-light signals; children move, freeze, or wiggle in the room
feedbackModel: energetic speech and pop/boing/silly/tada SFX; no failure state, just repeated movement cues and celebration
credits: Kaigani; emoji placeholder art only (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
